dsimp [s] at *

      have map_comp {u v} (p : (K n).LoopWalk u v) (f g : K n →g K n) : (p.map (K n) f).map (K n) g = p.map (K n) (g.comp f) := by

      rcases h1 with ⟨s1, e1, w1⟩

      use s1.trans s2, (by simp [e1, e2])
